questionHtml:
Which statement is correct about the entropy of a non-isolated system?


A.  It always increases

B.  It always decreases

C.  It can only increase if the entropy of the surroundings decreases

D.  It can only decrease if the entropy of the surroundings increases

meta.title: Which statement is correct about the entropy of a non-isolated system? A. It always increases B. It always decreases C. It can only increase if the entropy of the surroundings decr
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
